rationale: The citing paper references Nair, Manchanda, and Bhatia (2010) only in grouped literature-review citations. It is used as an example of prior work on dyadic social-interaction models and identification issues, but the paper does not engage that study's specific findings, mechanisms, data, or estimation strategy. There is no direct build-on, refinement, application, or critique of that specific article in the citing paper's model development or results interpretation.
